macro_asymmetry_overlay._comment: Macro Asymmetry Overlay - Biases exploits toward longs in underpriced regimes
macro_asymmetry_overlay._wrapped_comment: Can be: convexity_seeding, flow_pressure, funding_capture, funding_decay
macro_asymmetry_overlay._long_multiplier_comment: 1.5 = increase long position sizes by 50% in bull regime
macro_asymmetry_overlay._short_multiplier_comment: 0.5 = reduce short position sizes by 50% in bull regime
macro_asymmetry_overlay._sentiment_comment: Periods to calculate price momentum and volume trend
macro_asymmetry_overlay._btc_dom_comment_1: Requires external data feed - disable if not available
macro_asymmetry_overlay._btc_dom_comment_2: Below 50% = alt season, Above 50% = BTC season
macro_asymmetry_overlay._regret_comment: Prevents overtrading longs in overbought conditions
macro_asymmetry_overlay._max_longs_comment: Trigger DSPy check after 5 consecutive longs
macro_asymmetry_overlay._filter_comment: Block short positions when macro score > threshold
macro_asymmetry_overlay._min_score_comment: Minimum macro score (0-1) to allow any trades
macro_asymmetry_overlay._perf_comment_1: Long Bias Multiplier: 1.5× in favorable regimes
macro_asymmetry_overlay._perf_comment_3: Asymmetry: 3:1+ upside skew in 2026 recovery phase
macro_asymmetry_overlay._perf_comment_4: Regret Control: DSPy prevents FOMO longs in overbought
macro_asymmetry_overlay._perf_comment_5: Use Case: BTC/ETH recovery trades, institutional inflows

convexity_seeding._note: This config is used by the wrapped exploit instance

dspy._comment: DSPy for regret awareness is configured in macro_asymmetry_overlay section
